basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has officially announced the Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 40 years of age holding a Ph.D. in Civil Engineering with relevant domain experience are eligible to submit their online applications on or before 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates shall be as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Civil Engineering having relevant domain of work
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Civil Engineering having relevant domain of work. Desirable: Candidates having research experience and exposure of using LS-Dyna would be preferred.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Civil Engineering having relevant domain of work. Desirable: Candidates having research experience and exposure of using LS-Dyna would be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates shall be as per Government of India norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary
IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Jammu is 22nd July 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Civil Engineering with relevant domain experience. Research experience and familiarity with LS-Dyna are considered desirable qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. However, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month, which is inclusive of all allowances.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates, and finally an interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Jammu is a contractual job, offering a fixed-term engagement for the duration of the project or as specified in the offer letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Jammu located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu is located in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 181221.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Jammu and Kashmir apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Jammu and Kashmir. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or broader eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are typically required for the application?
faq.answer: While specific requirements can vary, generally, candidates need to upload their photograph, signature, and relevant educational and experience certificates in the prescribed format during the online application process.
